headline: Wedbush sends blunt message on Elon Musk's Tesla and Intel deal
summary: Elon Musk has spent years talking about vertical integration across his companies. With Terafab, he is starting to put a price tag on it. A very large one. Wall Street is now watching closely. And Wedbush just told investors what it thinks the numbers actually mean for the companies involved. ...
